symptom_vector: Pod crash and termination with container exit due to pod failure

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: Component [tidb-tikv-0] experienced [qps, grpc_qps, region_pending, io_util, tidb-tikv] fault.
reasoning_chain: Step 1: Check Metadata - Confirm faulty component is [tidb-tikv-0] (From Ground Truth instance field)
Step 2: Check Observation - Found keyword [productcatalogservice] in Trace data with latency anomalies (From GT key_observations)
Step 3: Check Observation - Found keyword [failure] in Log data (From GT key_observations)
Step 4: Check Observation - Found keyword [unavailable] in Log data (From GT key_observations)
Step 5: Check Observation - Found keyword [grpc_qps] in Metric data (From GT key_observations)
Step 6: Check Observation - Found keyword [qps] in Metric data (From GT key_observations)
Step 7: Check Observation - Found keyword [io_util] in Metric data (From GT key_observations)
Step 8: Check Observation - Found keyword [region_pending] in Metric data (From GT key_observations)
Step 9: Derive Root Cause - Based on above features, determined cause is [qps, grpc_qps, region_pending, io_util, tidb-tikv] (From Ground Truth key_metrics)

critical_checks.expected_pattern: productcatalogservice shows latency anomalies with rrt from 7.16ms to 20.35 seconds (3800x increase) and 'Error 9005 (HY000): Region is unavailable' errors
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'productcatalogservice' in trace data and check for latency spikes and region unavailable errors

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Log entries containing 'failed to query product by id', 'failed to get product', 'failed to prepare order' with Error 9005
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'failure' in logs to identify database query failures

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Multiple log entries with 'Region is unavailable' error message (Error 9005 HY000)
critical_checks.instruction: Search for keyword 'unavailable' in logs to confirm database region unavailability

critical_checks.expected_pattern: GRPC query per second metrics showing abnormal patterns
critical_checks.instruction: Check if grpc_qps metric shows abnormal values during fault period

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Query per second metrics showing abnormal patterns
critical_checks.instruction: Check if qps metric shows abnormal values during fault period
Check if io_util metric shows significant increase during fault period
